messages.text: You draw the mute edge across {target} and it takes the sound of the cut before the blood, opening a wound of pure cold silence. Your strike {verb} them!
{source} draws the mute edge across you and the wound arrives in perfect silence, the cold of it reaching the bone before the pain. The blow {verb} you!
{source} draws the mute edge across {target}, and the strike lands without a single sound, swallowed whole by the blade.
You sweep the mute edge at {target} and it passes in total quiet, cutting only the cold air.
{source} sweeps the mute edge at you and the noiseless blade whispers past, trailing frost.
{source} sweeps the mute edge at {target} and the silent blade finds only air.
You turn the mute edge into {target} and the whole refusal of the Unsung rides the stroke, dragging the sound and the warmth out of the wound at once! Your strike {verb} them!
{source} turns the mute edge into you and the cut takes your breath, your voice, and the cry you meant to make with it! The blow {verb} you!
{source} turns the mute edge into {target}, and the blade drinks the whole of the blow so that not even the impact makes a sound.
